title: Hypixel Skyblock Modpack
description: A collection of mods for optimizations and Hypixel SkyBlock.
body:
### ⚡ Hypixel SkyBlock Modpack - Optimized. Pre-Configured. Ready.

A fully set-up SkyBlock experience built for speed and performance.
Everything’s pre-configured, optimized, and tested no setup, no lag, just smooth gameplay.

#### 🚀 Highlights

* 🔧 Pre-configured out of the box
* 💨 Optimized for higher FPS and faster load times
* 🧠 QoL and SkyBlock utility mods included
* 🎯 Clean, stable, and lightweight setup
* ✅ 100% Hypixel-safe

Launch it. Play instantly. Grind smoother, faster, better.
